title: महा गणेश मन्त्र संग्रह
devanagariText:
॥ श्री महा गणेश मन्त्र संग्रह ॥

॥ गणपति मूल मन्त्र ॥
ॐ गं गणपतये नमः॥

॥ गणेश बीज मन्त्र ॥
ॐ श्रीं ह्रीं क्लीं ग्लौं गं गणपतये वर वरद सर्वजनं मे वशमानय स्वाहा॥

॥ महागणपति मन्त्र ॥
ॐ श्रीं ह्रीं क्लीं ग्लौं गं गणपतये नमः॥

॥ गणेश गायत्री मन्त्र ॥
ॐ एकदन्ताय विद्महे वक्रतुण्डाय धीमहि।
तन्नो दन्ती प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ ऋणहर्ता गणेश मन्त्र ॥
ॐ गणेश ऋणं छिन्धि वरेण्यं हुँ नमः फट्॥

॥ सिद्धि विनायक मन्त्र ॥
ॐ नमो सिद्धि विनायकाय सर्वकार्यकर्त्रे सर्वविघ्नप्रशमनाय
सर्वराज्यवश्यकरणाय सर्वजनसर्वस्त्रीपुरुषाकर्षणाय
श्रीं ॐ स्वाहा॥

॥ संकटनाशन गणेश मन्त्र ॥
ॐ ह्रीं ग्रीं ह्रीं सर्वसंकटहराय गणेशाय घ्रीं गं नमः॥

॥ विद्या प्राप्ति गणेश मन्त्र ॥
ॐ श्रीं ह्रीं सरस्वत्यै गणाधिपतये अमुकं मे वशमानय स्वाहा॥

॥ धन प्राप्ति गणेश मन्त्र ॥
ॐ गं गणपतये सर्वे जना मे वशमानय स्वाहा।
ॐ गं गणपतये धनं मे देहि स्वाहा॥

॥ उच्छिष्ट गणपति मन्त्र ॥
ॐ हस्ति पिशाचि लिखे स्वाहा॥

॥ हेरम्ब गणपति मन्त्र ॥
ॐ ऐं क्लीं ह्रौं हेरम्बाय ह्रौं क्लीं ऐं फट्॥

॥ लक्ष्मी गणपति मन्त्र ॥
ॐ श्रीं गं सौम्याय गणपतये वर वरद सर्वजनं मे वशमानय स्वाहा॥

॥ इति श्री महा गणेश मन्त्र संग्रह सम्पूर्णः ॥
transliteration:
|| Shrī Mahā Ganesha Mantra Saṅgraha ||

|| Gaṇapati Mūla Mantra ||
Om Gaṁ Gaṇapataye Namaḥ.

|| Ganesha Bīja Mantra ||
Om Śrīṁ Hrīṁ Klīṁ Glauṁ Gaṁ Gaṇapataye Vara Varada Sarvajanaṁ Me Vaśamānaya Svāhā.

|| Mahāgaṇapati Mantra ||
Om Śrīṁ Hrīṁ Klīṁ Glauṁ Gaṁ Gaṇapataye Namaḥ.

|| Ganesha Gāyatrī Mantra ||
Om Ekadantāya Vidmahe Vakratuṇḍāya Dhīmahi.
Tanno Dantī Prachodayāt.

|| Ṛṇahartā Ganesha Mantra ||
Om Gaṇeśa Ṛṇaṁ Chhindhi Vareṇyaṁ Huṁ Namaḥ Phaṭ.

|| Siddhi Vināyaka Mantra ||
Om Namo Siddhi Vināyakāya Sarvakāryakartre Sarvavighnapraśamanāya
Sarvarājyavaśyakaraṇāya Sarvajanasarvastrīpuruṣākarṣaṇāya
Śrīṁ Om Svāhā.

|| Saṅkaṭanāśana Ganesha Mantra ||
Om Hrīṁ Grīṁ Hrīṁ Sarvasaṅkaṭaharāya Gaṇeśāya Ghrīṁ Gaṁ Namaḥ.

|| Vidyā Prāpti Ganesha Mantra ||
Om Śrīṁ Hrīṁ Sarasvatyai Gaṇādhipataye Amukaṁ Me Vaśamānaya Svāhā.

|| Dhana Prāpti Ganesha Mantra ||
Om Gaṁ Gaṇapataye Sarve Janā Me Vaśamānaya Svāhā.
Om Gaṁ Gaṇapataye Dhanaṁ Me Dehi Svāhā.

|| Uchchhiṣṭa Gaṇapati Mantra ||
Om Hasti Piśāchi Likhe Svāhā.

|| Heramba Gaṇapati Mantra ||
Om Aiṁ Klīṁ Hrauṁ Herambāya Hrauṁ Klīṁ Aiṁ Phaṭ.

|| Lakṣmī Gaṇapati Mantra ||
Om Śrīṁ Gaṁ Saumyāya Gaṇapataye Vara Varada Sarvajanaṁ Me Vaśamānaya Svāhā.

|| Iti Shrī Mahā Ganesha Mantra Saṅgrahaḥ sampūrṇaḥ ||
hindiMeaning: गणपति मूल मन्त्र: ॐ गं गणपतये नमः - यह गणेश जी का सबसे सरल और शक्तिशाली मूल मन्त्र है। बीज मन्त्र में श्रीं, ह्रीं, क्लीं, ग्लौं बीजाक्षरों के साथ गणपति से सभी जनों को वश में करने की प्रार्थना है। गायत्री मन्त्र में एकदन्त और वक्रतुण्ड के रूप में गणेश का ध्यान है। ऋणहर्ता मन्त्र कर्ज से मुक्ति दिलाता है। सिद्धि विनायक मन्त्र सभी कार्यों की सिद्धि, विघ्न शमन और सभी को आकर्षित करने वाला है। संकटनाशन मन्त्र सभी संकटों को हरता है। विद्या प्राप्ति मन्त्र ज्ञान प्रदान करता है। धन प्राप्ति मन्त्र धन और समृद्धि देता है। हेरम्ब गणपति मन्त्र विशेष शक्तिशाली सुरक्षा मन्त्र है। लक्ष्मी गणपति मन्त्र धन-ऐश्वर्य की प्राप्ति के लिए है।
benefits: Comprehensive collection of the most powerful Ganesha mantras
Rinaharta mantra specifically removes debts and financial burdens
Siddhi Vinayaka mantra accomplishes all tasks and removes all obstacles
Sankat Nashan mantra destroys all types of crises and dangers
Lakshmi Ganapati mantra combines wealth and obstacle-removal blessings
Each mantra serves a specific purpose from education to prosperity
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Ganesha, Maha Ganesh Mantra Collection (महा गणेश मन्त्र संग्रह) stands as a sacred prayer. Attributed to Various Tantric and Puranic Sources, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Devotees recite this prayer to siddhi Vinayaka mantra accomplishes all tasks and remove all obstacles and comprehensive collection of the most powerful Ganesha mantras. It is also said to sankat Nashan mantra destroys all types of crises and dangers. For best results, devotees chant this on Wednesday (Budhvar) and during Ganesh Chaturthi and Sankashti Chaturthi. With 12 verses and a reading time of about 8 minutes, this prayer is ideal for both daily worship and special occasions. On this page, you can read the complete Maha Ganesh Mantra Collection in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Maha Ganesh Mantra collection in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Powerful mantras for wealth, debt relief, knowledge, and obstacle removal.
relatedSearches: Maha Ganesh Mantra collection Sanskrit PDF
Rinaharta Ganesha mantra for debt removal
Lakshmi Ganapati mantra wealth and obstacles
Maha Ganapati mantra Shrim Hrim Klim Glaum Gam
Ganesha mantra for marriage and progeny
Vidya Prapti Ganapati mantra for students

seoFaqs.question: What is the Maha Ganesh Mantra Collection and how is it organised?
seoFaqs.answer: The Maha Ganesh Mantra Collection is a comprehensive curated set of twelve principal Ganesha mantras drawn from various tantric and puranic sources, grouped by purpose. It includes the Ganapati Mula Mantra (Om Gam Ganapataye Namah), the Ganesha Bija Mantra, the Mahaganapati eight-bija mantra, the Ganesha Gayatri Mantra, the Rinaharta (debt-removal) Mantra, the Siddhi Vinayaka Mantra, the Sankatanashana (calamity-destroying) Mantra, the Vidya Prapti (knowledge-gaining) Mantra, the Dhana Prapti (wealth-gaining) Mantra, the tantric Uchchhishta Ganapati Mantra, the Heramba Ganapati Mantra and the Lakshmi Ganapati Mantra. (Sources: Mantra Mahodadhi; Mantra Maharnava; Sharada Tilaka Tantra.)

seoFaqs.question: How is this Maha Ganesh Mantra Collection different from the Ganesha Maha Mantra Sangraha?
seoFaqs.answer: Both texts are mantra anthologies of Lord Ganesha but differ in scope and emphasis. The Ganesha Maha Mantra Sangraha emphasises mainstream daily-recitation mantras drawn from Vedic and puranic sources, including the universal Vakratunda Mahakaya shloka and the Dvadasanama Stotram. The Maha Ganesh Mantra Collection is broader and more purpose-specific, including specialised tantric mantras for particular life situations such as debt-removal (Rinaharta), wealth-attraction (Lakshmi Ganapati), powerful protection (Heramba), and the rare and tantric Uchchhishta Ganapati. The first is a daily-worship collection; the second is a problem-solving toolkit organised by purpose. (Sources: comparison of stotra anthologies; Mantra Mahodadhi.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the Rinaharta Ganesha Mantra and how is it traditionally used?
seoFaqs.answer: The Rinaharta Ganesha Mantra is Om Ganesha rinam chhindhi varenyam hum namah phat — meaning O Ganesha, sever my debts, O eminent one, hum, salutations, phat. It is the principal mantra prescribed in the Mantra Mahodadhi for those overwhelmed by debt, financial obligations, loans, or persistent poverty. Traditional sadhana involves japa of 108 to 1008 repetitions daily on Wednesdays for 41 days facing east, before a Rinaharta Ganesha murti, with offerings of red flowers, modaka and durva grass. The famous Rinaharta Ganapati temple at Tejpur (Maharashtra) and Bhadran (Gujarat) are pilgrimage sites for those seeking debt relief. (Sources: Mantra Mahodadhi; Rinaharta Ganesh kshetra traditions.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the Uchchhishta Ganapati mantra and why does it require caution?
seoFaqs.answer: Uchchhishta Ganapati is one of the thirty-two forms of Ganapati and is a tantric vamachara form depicted with his Shakti, often shown in intimate iconography. The mantra Om Hasti Pishachi Likhe Svaha is the bija-mantra of this form. Strict tradition requires diksha (initiation) from a qualified tantric guru in the Shri Vidya or Shakta lineage before this mantra can be safely chanted, because uchchhishta worship has specific ritual rules (worship without taking bath, with food in mouth, in non-conventional times) that are easy to misuse. Householders without initiation are advised to stay with the Mula Mantra (Om Gam Ganapataye Namah) and the saumya forms of Ganapati. (Sources: Sharada Tilaka Tantra; Mantra Mahodadhi; traditional tantric guidance.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the Heramba Ganapati mantra and why is Heramba unique?
seoFaqs.answer: Heramba Ganapati is the protective five-faced (panchamukha), ten-armed form of Ganesha riding a lion (rather than a mouse), depicted in red and granting fearlessness through the abhaya mudra. The mantra Om Aim Klim Hraum Herambaya Hraum Klim Aim Phat is preserved in the Mudgala Purana and Mantra Mahodadhi and is considered exceptionally powerful for warding off enemies, removing fear, and protecting against supernatural threats. The Heramba form is especially popular in Nepal and East Indian tantric traditions. The five faces represent the five elements over which Heramba has dominion, and the lion vahana shows his sovereign protective power. (Sources: Mudgala Purana; Heramba Upanishad; Nepalese Ganapati traditions.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the Lakshmi Ganapati mantra and when is it recited?
seoFaqs.answer: Lakshmi Ganapati is the wealth-bestowing form of Ganesha depicted seated with Mahalakshmi on his lap (or with two consorts representing Riddhi and Siddhi), holding a parrot and a green branch, and is one of the thirty-two Ganapati forms specifically associated with prosperity. The mantra Om Shrim Gam Saumyaya Ganapataye, Vara Varada Sarvajanam Me Vashamanaya Svaha combines the Lakshmi bija Shrim with the Ganesha bija Gam in a unified invocation for combined removal of obstacles to wealth and the active blessing of prosperity. It is recited especially on Diwali, Akshaya Tritiya, Sankashti Chaturthi and Fridays for business success and household prosperity. (Sources: Mudgala Purana 32 forms; Mantra Mahodadhi.)
